nasb.text: And Jesus said to them, “Nor will I tell you by what authority I do these things.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to them, “Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“我也不告訴你們，我憑著甚麼權柄作這些事。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我也不告诉你们我凭什么权柄做这些事。”

csbs.text: 耶稣就对他们说：“我也不告诉你们我凭什么权柄做这些事。”
